description1About: I'm Agus Efendi👋, a web developer from Bangkalan. Nice to meet you. A little story about programming, I prefer working on the backend rather than the frontend because I'm less creative when it comes to design but can still handle fullstack but with standard frontend design😁. If you have any questions, please contact me via the contact form or my social media.
